title: Compass Step Rail
prompt: Create a production-ready Compass Step Rail using TypeScript React, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion. This original navigation pattern moves through four project phases on a compact horizontal rail while keeping the active phase obvious by label, number, and position. Build it on a pale Bento stage with a white 22px-radius surface, #111111 type, #4A4A4F supporting labels, #ECECEE dividers, and a single cyan active marker. The rail must not use gradients or excessive shadows. Use actual buttons in a tablist with tab roles, aria-selected, aria-controls, and a concise tabpanel summary; support ArrowLeft, ArrowRight, Home, and End roving navigation in addition to Tab and Enter or Space. The focused tab needs a visible dark outline and every target should be at least 44px. On selection, slide the marker with a spring near stiffness 350 and damping 28 and fade the panel in 180ms ease-out; avoid layout-thrashing animation. Keep state local and make the server-rendered first phase meaningful. The rail must wrap or scroll safely at 320px and stretch naturally in a large detail preview without fixed coordinates. Include text that never relies only on color, AA contrast, and an aria-live polite phase announcement. Do not use remote assets, random data, browser storage, network requests, or uncleared timers. With prefers-reduced-motion, show the selected marker in place and use a short opacity change only. Return paste-ready client code, then pure CSS approximation and suggested HTML.

code.css:
/* HTML: <nav class="compass-step-rail"><button aria-current="step">01 Brief</button></nav> */
.compass-step-rail{display:flex;gap:6px;padding:12px;border:1px solid #ececee;border-radius:22px;background:#fff}.compass-step-rail button{min-height:44px;flex:1;border:0;border-bottom:4px solid transparent;background:#fff;color:#111;font-weight:800}.compass-step-rail button[aria-current=step]{border-color:#53e8d4}.compass-step-rail button:focus-visible{outline:3px solid #111;outline-offset:2px}@media(max-width:360px){.compass-step-rail{overflow-x:auto}.compass-step-rail button{min-width:72px}}
